description: A split image showing two different anime scenes, both featuring a character pointing or gesturing towards a vast blue expanse, implying a sense of wonder or aspiration.

subject.description: An anime character with dark hair, seen from the back/side, wearing a light-colored top, pointing towards a shimmering ocean horizon.
A younger anime character (Eren Yeager) with dark, spiky hair, wearing a white shirt and a dark hooded jacket, with an excited expression.
subject.action: Stretching arms out, looking up with an open mouth

composition.angle: low angle, looking up at the character

visual_elements.colors: Dominantly blue (sky, ocean), white (clouds, shirt, light reflections), muted earth tones for characters' clothing.
visual_elements.lighting: Bright, natural daylight, with strong reflections on the water in the upper image.
